channel.title: GitHub PHP Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of PHP in GitHub

item.title: shopware/shopware
item.description: Shopware 6 is an open commerce platform based on Symfony Framework and Vue and supported by a worldwide community and more than 1.500 community extensions

item.title: JhumanJ/OpnForm
item.description: Beautiful Open-Source Form Builder

item.title: vitodeploy/vito
item.description: The Ultimate Server Management Tool

item.title: MISP/MISP
item.description: MISP (core software) - Open Source Threat Intelligence and Sharing Platform

item.title: leokhoa/laragon
item.description: Laragon is a portable, isolated, fast & powerful universal development environment for PHP, Node.js, Python, Java, Go, Ruby. It is fast, lightweight, easy-to-use and easy-to-extend.

item.title: statamic/cms
item.description: The core Laravel CMS Composer package

item.title: woocommerce/woocommerce
item.description: A customizable, open-source ecommerce platform built on WordPress. Build any commerce solution you can imagine.

item.title: cedar2025/Xboard
item.description: 基于V2board二次开发支持新协议新特性的高性能面板

item.title: Dolibarr/dolibarr
item.description: Dolibarr ERP CRM is a modern software package to manage your company or foundation's activity (contacts, suppliers, invoices, orders, stocks, agenda, accounting, ...). it's an open source Web application (written in PHP) designed for businesses of any sizes, foundations and freelancers.

item.title: Part-DB/Part-DB-server
item.description: Part-DB is an Open source inventory management system for your electronic components

item.title: pimcore/pimcore
item.description: Core Framework for the Open Source Data & Experience Management Platform (PIM, MDM, CDP, DAM, DXP/CMS & Digital Commerce)

item.title: Leantime/leantime
item.description: Leantime is a goals focused project management system for non-project managers. Building with ADHD, Autism, and dyslexia in mind.

item.title: glpi-project/glpi
item.description: GLPI is a Free Asset and IT Management Software package, Data center management, ITIL Service Desk, licenses tracking and software auditing.

item.title: espocrm/espocrm
item.description: EspoCRM – Open Source CRM Application

item.title: symfony/symfony
item.description: The Symfony PHP framework

item.title: twigphp/Twig
item.description: Twig, the flexible, fast, and secure template language for PHP

item.title: librenms/librenms
item.description: Community-based GPL-licensed network monitoring system

item.title: cweagans/composer-patches
item.description: Simple patches plugin for Composer

item.title: filamentphp/filament
item.description: A collection of beautiful full-stack components for Laravel. The perfect starting point for your next app. Using Livewire, Alpine.js and Tailwind CSS.

item.title: TYPO3/typo3
item.description: The TYPO3 Core - Enterprise Content Management System. Synchronized mirror of https://review.typo3.org/q/project:Packages/TYPO3.CMS

item.title: matomo-org/matomo
item.description: Empowering People Ethically with the leading open source alternative to Google Analytics that gives you full control over your data. Matomo lets you easily collect data from websites & apps and visualise this data and extract insights. Privacy is built-in. Liberating Web Analytics. Star us on Github? +1. And we love Pull Requests!

item.title: kanboard/kanboard
item.description: Kanban project management software

item.title: alextselegidis/easyappointments
item.description: 📅 Easy!Appointments - Self Hosted Appointment Scheduler
